indicators.name: Hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring can be uncomfortable and may cause injury during yoga and stretching.

indicators.name: No windows
indicators.rationale: No natural light may make it difficult to perform yoga and stretching activities.

indicators.name: No mats
indicators.rationale: No yoga mats suggest that the space is not suitable for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The space is not suitable for yoga and stretching due to hard flooring, lack of natural light, and absence of yoga mats.
